name: BLOOM-7B1
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (ALiBi positional encoding, GPT-2-style, GeLU)
note: 7.07B multilingual BLOOM checkpoint, the practical size for downstream fine-tuning and local deployment.
verificationNotes: Confirmed on HF model card: 7,069,016,064 params (7.069B) exact match; RAIL v1.0 license; 2048-token context; 45 natural + 12 programming = 57 languages matches langCount exactly. Page states training ended ~July 5, 2022, consistent with the July 11, 2022 public release date shared across the BLOOM checkpoint family. No changes made.
